name: Murky Toxin
description: Notes This poison is unique in that using it will throw two bombs at once, which will target the cursor and land at the same time in a concentric circle. The smaller bomb particles are a lighter shade of brown than the larger bomb’s. The smaller bomb - with a radius of 2.5 - is the one that deals most of the damage.

stats.damage: Smaller Bomb: 10.5 (+0.2 per DEX over 70) % Bigger Bomb: 8 (+0.2 per ATT over 60) %
